mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : LessonTimeDAO.select 설 명 : 교시 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.LCTR_CLASTMNM , A.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ , A.LCTR_MTHD , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM A WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId}
AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
/* SQL ID : LessonTimeDAO.selectLessonTimeOrderMax 설 명 : 교시 순서 최대값 */ SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId})
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : LessonTimeDAO.copyLessonTime 설 명 : 교시 복사 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM ( SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , LCTR_SCHDL_ID , SBJCT_ID , LCTR_CLASTMNM , LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ , LCTR_MTHD , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM ) SELECT #{lessonTimeId} , #{lessonScheduleId} , #{crsCreCd} , LCTR_CLASTMNM , LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ , LCTR_MTHD , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{copyLessonTimeId}
